title: Melee Ex Machina (Weapons & More)
description: A mod that provides all the weapons you need for your unsolvable plot points.
body:
|![MELEE EX MACHINA](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/ac7bff617c0a8da5ef0c533248a178f092e1a2eb.png)|
|:-:|
|[![PATREON](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/5734cca1afdce0361bf51525d192d857e4ee5255.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Crumbslord)     [![TWITTER](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/3258940f91415129514d21e643c3ecbed11f54aa.png)](https://twitter.com/CrumbsLord)    [![CURSEFORGE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/534277007517bb3af8a2cdd14b49d1fe3d67e2ee.png)](https://curseforge.com/members/lord_of_crumbs)     [![MODRINTH](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/d6ef08c353be7e06bf25284aadf17f296f81e85e.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Lord_Of_Crumbs)|

![INFO](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/9e814232fbb13013399076b3d44aaf1b5dbd9ea9.png)


A mod that plans to have many melee weapons for all your fighting needs.

The name was inspired my the concept of a "Deus Ex Machina"

Versions past 1.3.2 have complete compatibility with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) is recommended for a better, combat experience.


![FEATURES](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/b65c5829fc12f35c026055b78067106d61acdc02.png)


Weapons added so far: (101~153)

- Katanas (11~26)
- Hammers (8)
- Spears (8)
- Greatswords (8)
- Swords (7)
- Sickles (7)
- Tridents (7)
- Maces (6)
- Bats (6) 
- Scythes (6) 
- Knives (6)
- Axes (6)
- Staffs (5~37) 
- Rapiers (5~10)
- Cutlasses (5)
 

Possible future features: (wip; might change)

- Butcher knives
